business_ideas.idea: Bingo Loco: boozy bingo raves in nightlife venues with performers, confetti, drinking; competitor model proven at $20M/year
Food challenge eating contests in bars: free food if you finish, friends pay to drink/cheer, gamble on outcomes
Traeger competitor/meat smoking equipment brand with influencer affiliate distribution network

predictions.text: Creator brands will washout; most will fail because it's overcrowded, only winners have 10x distribution or great products like Danny's
B2B products (like Hampton $8K/year) are better creator-brand play than consumer products for mid-tier creators
